title: Vaada Vaada Nanba Lyrics Bramman Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Vaada Vaada Nanba
Singer(s): Andrea Jeremiah, MLR Karthikeyan
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Movie: Bramman

Oh..natpu oru padhi kadhal oru padhi
pichi pichi pottadhula
inga onnumilla meedhi.
Sogam oru paadhi, thiyagam oru paadhi
eppa varum eppa varum
iva punnaikkum thedhi.

Vaada vaada vaada vaada nanba
oru vaanampaadi pola engum
suthiduvom themmbaa.

Vaada vaada vaada vaada nanba
nerukku neraa modhipparpom
vazhakai enna kombaa.

Ammaadi emmaadi
nam vazhkka kannaadi
kallonnu illaama thoolaagum ammaadi.

Aathaadi aathaadi naamellaam
kaathaadi kathilla ingenaa
ennaagum aathaadi.

Jumma jummale emma
jumma jummale
ada ellaam vittu aattam podu
neeyum nammaale.

Oh..natpu oru padhi kadhal oru padhi
pichi pichi pottadhula
inga onnumilla meedhi.
Sogam oru paadhi, thiyagam oru paadhi
eppa varum eppa varum
iva punnaikkum thedhi.

Amma thaduppa pola
maaraama ennaalumey
chinna vayasu natpu
vazhum nenjoda.

Kannil pugundhu vitta
mannu thugala pola.
kadhal ninnu kollum
ullukkullara.

Kadal thaedi pona nadhi
pola natpai, ivan thaedi pona
thaniyaa.

Uyir natpum indru
vegum dhooram poche
ada veyil patta paniyaa...

Jumma jummale emma
jumma jummale
ada ellaam vittu aattam podu
neeyum nammaale.

Anji nimisham munna
enna nenachominnu
araanji paathayinnaa ,
onnum thonaadhu.

Neju kavala ellaam
panjaa parandhu pogum
kaalam marandhidaadha
kaayam ingaedhu.

Oru melugu mela
patta mazhayappola
engum ottaama vazha palagu.
edhu engae pogum
edhu enna vaagum
edhum nam kayilil illa unaru.

Jumma jummale emma
jumma jummale
ada ellaam vittu aattam podu
neeyum nammaale.

Oh..natpu oru padhi kadhal oru padhi
pichi pichi pottadhula
inga onnumilla meedhi.
Sogam oru paadhi, thiyagam oru paadhi
eppa varum eppa varum
iva punnaikkum thedhi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Vaada Vaada Nanba celebrates friendship and the joy of togetherness, conveying a light-hearted and fun vibe.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Bramman, the song captures moments of camaraderie and fun among friends, enhancing the film's light-hearted narrative.

Who are the singers and music director?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and MLR Karthikeyan, with music composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was the song released?

Vaada Vaada Nanba was released on February 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaada Vaada Nanba, the lively duet captures the essence of friendship and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for joyous occasions. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and camaraderie, inviting listeners to join in the fun. Set against the backdrop of Bramman, the song enhances the film's playful narrative, showcasing the bond between friends. With its infectious energy, this track is sure to resonate with anyone looking to celebrate life's moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaada Vaada Nanba from Bramman is a vibrant celebration of friendship and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Andrea Jeremiah and MLR Karthikeyan. With Devi Sri Prasad's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the energy and fun that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Oh.. friendship is half love and half craziness, there's nothing here on top. Sadness is half, sacrifice is half, when will it come, when will it come, searching for this girl.
Come come come come friend, like a sky bird we will fly everywhere, buddy.
Come come come come friend, we will live life straight, what is life, buddy.
Oh my, our life is like a mirror, without a stone it will break, oh my.
Oh dear, we all are like a bunch of fools, wherever we go, what will happen, oh dear.
Jumma jumma, our jumma jumma, leave everything and let’s play, you and us.
Oh.. friendship is half love and half craziness, there's nothing here on top. Sadness is half, sacrifice is half, when will it come, when will it come, searching for this girl.
Like a mother’s care, no matter what, friendship lives in the heart of the young.
Like the mud that enters the eyes, love will capture the heart.
Like a river searching for the sea, friendship is searching for someone.
Life and friendship have now gone far away, oh the sun has burnt the rain...
Jumma jumma, our jumma jumma, leave everything and let’s play, you and us.
In five minutes, I thought of something and got confused, nothing is clear.
The worries of yesterday will fly away, don’t forget the time that has passed here.
Like a heavy rain falling on a hill, everywhere it flows together. Where will it go, what will it become, nothing is in our hands, just know.
Jumma jumma, our jumma jumma, leave everything and let’s play, you and us.
Oh.. friendship is half love and half craziness, there's nothing here on top. Sadness is half, sacrifice is half, when will it come, when will it come, searching for this girl.
